projectDescription: A full-stack SaaS platform offering virtual Windows desktops in the cloud with zero-trust network security, instant provisioning, and multi-region support.
keyFeatures: Virtual Windows desktops provisioned in under 8 minutes
Zero-trust security architecture with cryptographic verification
Configurable vCPU (2-16 cores), RAM (4-64GB), and storage (60-500GB)
Multi-region support: Mexico, USA, Europe, and Bare Metal (OVH)
SSO integration with Okta, Azure AD, Google Workspace, and OIDC
Multi-language support (EN, ES, FR, DE, PT)
Real-time pricing configurator with monthly/annual billing
Role-based access control (RBAC) and audit logging
publicApiSurface: GET /platform — Platform overview, features, and security sections
GET /use-cases — Secure Remote Access and Site-to-Site VPN scenarios
GET /docs — Documentation with installation guides and configuration
GET /configure — Interactive desktop configurator with real-time pricing
GET /demo — Live demo environment selector (Windows 11, Ubuntu, VS Code)
useConfiguratorStore — Zustand store for plan/vCPU/RAM/disk/region/addons state
LanguageContext — Multi-language provider (en, es, fr, de, pt)
